info.title: Shopify Service
info.description:
Shopify Service

 **Last update**: 28 ene 26, 11:00 p. m.

get.description: Retrieves a specific account by its ID

post.description: Creates a new account or updates an existing one

get.description: Retrieves an order from the integration by its integration order ID
Retrieves a specific location by its ID

put.description: Updates the warehouses information for a specific location

get.description: Retrieves a specific order by its ID
Retrieves a list of order status changes
Retrieves a specific order status change record by its ID
Retrieves shop information by shop name

post.summary: Associate the shop to a client janis
post.description: Associates a Shopify shop to a Janis client account
Disconnects a Shopify shop from the Janis client account
Imports shop data from Shopify into Janis

get.description: Retrieves shop installation information and redirects to admin

post.description: Manually triggers the import of shop data from Shopify into Janis

get.summary: Get the endpoint to install a Shop
get.description: Retrieves the configuration endpoint for installing a Shopify shop
